user_prompt: Collect some relevant news articles about Agentic AI software services, and write a marketing post about FlowAI
content:
Unlock your productivity potential with FlowAI Core! Imagine gaining back 2 hours each day—time that you can spend on what truly matters. Our AI-powered task automation learns your unique workflow and takes care of repetitive tasks, letting you focus on creativity and strategy.

With seamless integration across 50+ tools, FlowAI Core adapts to your needs, transforming chaos into clarity. Say goodbye to tedious tasks and hello to a smarter way of working—all for just $29/month.

Don’t let time slip away; embrace the future of intelligent automation with FlowAI and watch your productivity soar. Work less, flow more!
sources: - [Experian and ServiceNow Team to Help AI Agents Act Faster](https://www.pymnts.com/artificial-intelligence-2/2026/experian-and-servicenow-team-to-help-ai-agents-act-faster/)

- [LiveRamp Announces Fourth Quarter and Fiscal Year 2026 Results](https://www.globenewswire.com/news-release/2026/05/17/3296257/0/en/LiveRamp-Announces-Fourth-Quarter-and-Fiscal-Year-2026-Results.html)
- [Why ‘Quality Data’, Not Big Data Is Critical For Process Efficiencies](https://www.forbes.com/sites/gauravsharma/2026/05/16/why-quality-data-not-big-data-is-critical-for-process-efficiencies/)

- [App days are numbered: The end state of software will be private, personal, verified, and AI agent-built](https://cryptoslate.com/app-days-are-numbered-the-end-state-of-software-is-private-personal-verified-and-ai-agent-built/)

full_post:
Unlock your productivity potential with FlowAI Core! Imagine gaining back 2 hours each day—time that you can spend on what truly matters. Our AI-powered task automation learns your unique workflow and takes care of repetitive tasks, letting you focus on creativity and strategy.

With seamless integration across 50+ tools, FlowAI Core adapts to your needs, transforming chaos into clarity. Say goodbye to tedious tasks and hello to a smarter way of working—all for just $29/month.

Don’t let time slip away; embrace the future of intelligent automation with FlowAI and watch your productivity soar. Work less, flow more!
